title: Defensive UI hardening in loadPendingReviews
description: Modify public/index.html:3461-3485 so loadPendingReviews checks response.ok and Content-Type before parsing JSON, and surfaces structured backend errors via showToast with a user-friendly message. Keep console.error for full diagnostics.
notes: Target function loadPendingReviews currently calls response.json() unconditionally. Add response.ok guard, content-type check, and structured error handling. The live public/ mount means this change takes effect without requiring a container rebuild.
